---
name: Feature request / idea
about: Suggest an improvement or a new capability
title: "[Idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? Who feels this?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one.

## Scope

- [ ] This touches the **protocol** (REST/MCP API, staking/economics, state machine).
      If so, it follows the proposal process in
      [GOVERNANCE.md](https://github.com/Pacta-Protocol/Pacta.Protocol/blob/main/GOVERNANCE.md).
- [ ] This is an app, docs, or website change.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps explain the idea.
